text: Training signal: The login code expires before it arrives.
label: account_access

text: Example for routing: The workspace invite works for teammates but not me.
label: account_access

text: Observed user wording: I know my password but cannot enter.
label: account_access

text: Training signal: The invoice includes seats removed last month.
label: billing_dispute

text: Example for routing: We were charged twice for one renewal.
label: billing_dispute

text: Observed user wording: The receipt does not match the subscription quote.
label: billing_dispute

text: Training signal: The upload button freezes after file selection.
label: technical_bug

text: Example for routing: Saving a dashboard throws an error for one project.
label: technical_bug

text: Observed user wording: The export modal closes without a file.
label: technical_bug

text: Training signal: Please add bulk member import.
label: feature_request

text: Example for routing: We need custom roles for reviewers.
label: feature_request

text: Observed user wording: A keyboard shortcut for archive would help.
label: feature_request

text: Training signal: Someone logged in from a new country.
label: security_risk

text: Example for routing: An unknown API token was created overnight.
label: security_risk

text: Observed user wording: Audit logs show suspicious access.
label: security_risk

text: Training signal: Every user in our region gets a blank page.
label: service_outage

text: Example for routing: The whole service is unreachable.
label: service_outage

text: Observed user wording: Status checks fail across all projects.
label: service_outage
